title: Thermal Vision Goggles
description: Adds thermal imaging goggles with crafting recipe.
body:
The thermal imaging goggles can be activataed via a custom keybind. All living entities will be highlighted and the world will be seen through a grayscale. The goggles alaso haave night vision properties.
![Scene without thermal imaging.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e8f82b98ebd0f4c0da78ac0859e7d53cc577aff3_0.webp)
![Scene with thermal imaging.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/35b7309a5fbf6a8505586f7a4c9dadce5a36c1ec.png)

**There is no config file yet.**



Please credit me if you plan on distributing content containing this mod.

Discord for private messaging:
https://discord.com/users/398496975949004800

Check out my other mod: **Exoskeleton armor**! Thermal imaging, incremental jump boost aand more.
https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/exoskeleton-armor
